headline: Dow Jones Component's Spinoff Joins S&P 500. Shares Jump.
summary: Honeywell's aerospace spinoff will be added to the S&P 500 index next week, while IES Holdings, a data center electric power provider, is going into the Midcap S&P 400. Both stocks rallied. Honeywell Aerospace will be officially in the S&P 500 at the start of trading on Monday, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Tuesday.

headline: Volatility Is Taking A Breather Ahead Of Micron Earnings
summary: A sense of calm is taking over the markets in early trading after the tech sector took a deep dive Monday and Tuesday.

headline: Conagra Brands Kicks Off Summer with Exciting New Introductions
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG), one of North America's leading branded food companies, is introducing an extensive lineup of new food arriving on shelves this month. These introductions across the company's portfolio of frozen foods and grocery staples deliver on consumers desire for taste, convenience and value. From hearty breakfast bowls, midday snacks, and dinnertime solutions, the new lineup highlights the modern attributes today's consumers seek.
